overall.description: A first-person view from the bridge of a vessel navigating through a harbor channel at night in a maritime simulation game. The camera shows the ship's bow cutting through calm water while three navigation monitors display radar, chart, and depth data as the vessel approaches a dock structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating harbor approach channel

agents.ego_description: operating the vessel from the bridge, maintaining steady course through the harbor channel while monitoring the radar and navigation displays

entered.detail: three navigation screens displaying chart plotter, radar scan, and depth finder data
front deck of the ship with red and green navigation lights visible
calm dark water surface reflecting minimal light
long concrete breakwater structure running parallel to the channel
red marker light visible atop the dock structure in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a steady approach through a harbor channel at night from the ship's bridge. The three navigation monitors are prominently visible at the top of the frame, displaying chart, radar, and depth data. The vessel's bow cuts through calm water as a concrete dock wall becomes gradually visible on the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge passing dock structures near marina entrance

events.description: navigation instruction dialogue appears from character Shelley directing to take the second exit on the right to reach the marina

agents.ego_description: continuing to navigate the vessel forward through the channel, passing closer to the dock wall on the right while receiving navigation instructions

entered.detail: cluster of white and red lights marking the marina entrance channel
wooden or concrete pier extending from the dock wall with mooring equipment visible

segments.scene_description: The vessel continues moving forward as the dock wall on the right draws closer and more detailed. A dialogue instruction appears briefly, providing navigation guidance for the marina entrance. The concrete dock wall now dominates the right side of the frame as the ship passes alongside it, with pier structures and marina entrance lights becoming visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady first-person progression from the open harbor channel toward the detailed confines of a marina entrance at night. It begins on the ship's bridge, where three navigation monitors displaying chart, radar, and depth data frame the view of the bow cutting through calm water. As the vessel moves forward, a concrete dock wall gradually emerges and draws closer on the right side of the frame. The scene then shifts as the dock wall begins to dominate the view, accompanied by a brief dialogue instruction providing navigation guidance. Finally, the camera glides alongside the concrete structure, revealing the pier installations and the glowing lights of the marina entrance.
